mapper.sql: select e.enrollment_id, e.course_id, e.course_name, e.student_user_id, coalesce(nullif(su.nick_name, ''), su.user_name, e.student_name) as student_name, e.parent_user_id, coalesce(nullif(pu.nick_name, ''), pu.user_name, e.parent_name) as parent_name, e.teacher_user_id, coalesce(nullif(tu.nick_name, ''), tu.user_name, e.teacher_name) as teacher_name, e.status, e.signup_source, e.learning_record, e.interaction_summary, e.create_by, e.create_time, e.update_by, e.update_time, e.remark, c.status as course_status, c.campus, c.week_day, c.start_time, c.end_time, c.start_date, c.end_date from edu_course_enrollment e left join edu_course c on c.course_id = e.course_id left join sys_user su on su.user_id = e.student_user_id left join sys_user pu on pu.user_id = e.parent_user_id left join sys_user tu on tu.user_id = e.teacher_user_id

where.if: and coalesce(nullif(su.nick_name, ''), su.user_name, e.student_name) like concat('%', #{studentName}, '%')
and coalesce(nullif(tu.nick_name, ''), tu.user_name, e.teacher_name) like concat('%', #{teacherName}, '%')

mapper.insert: insert into edu_course_enrollment (course_id, course_name, student_user_id, student_name, parent_user_id, parent_name, teacher_user_id, teacher_name, status, signup_source, learning_record, interaction_summary, remark, create_by, create_time) values (#{courseId}, #{courseName}, #{studentUserId}, #{studentName}, #{parentUserId}, #{parentName}, #{teacherUserId}, #{teacherName}, #{status}, #{signupSource}, #{learningRecord}, #{interactionSummary}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, sysdate())
mapper.update: update edu_course set current_capacity = ifnull(current_capacity, 0) + 1 where course_id = #{courseId}
update edu_course set current_capacity = case when ifnull(current_capacity, 0) > 0 then current_capacity - 1 else 0 end where course_id = #{courseId}
mapper.select: select count(1) from edu_course_enrollment e left join sys_user su on su.user_id = e.student_user_id left join sys_user tu on tu.user_id = e.teacher_user_id
